title: Abort stuck main merge, investigate red verify, merge ready worktree(s) back to main
action: git merge --abort on main to clear MERGE_HEAD left by a failed `bee worktree merge --id beegog--wt--backlog-auto-commit --cleanup` (verify failed, auto-abort side effect did not fully restore). Investigate what run_verify.mjs reported red on the merged tree. If the failure is pre-existing/unrelated to backlog-auto-commit's change, retry the merge. Otherwise report and leave marked red, no retry. herding-dispatch-lock-toggle worktree stays untouched (not finished).

truths: main's working tree is clean (no stray MERGE_HEAD) when this cell caps
backlog-auto-commit worktree is merged into main and cleaned up, OR left untouched with a clear reported reason if verify is genuinely red because of its own change

trace.outcome: Aborted stuck main merge; found baseline verify red was pre-existing release_manifest mode-differ (664 vs 644 umask drift, content unaffected); regenerated manifest, merged backlog-auto-commit worktree (resolved a manifest-only textual conflict by regenerating fresh post-merge), verify green 87/87, cleaned up worktree+branch+grant. herding-dispatch-lock-toggle left untouched (not finished, still needs compounding).
